data.title: Andrew Peller Limited (TSX: ADW.A / ADW.B) announced W. James Westlake's resignation from the board of directors.
data.description: In Grimsby, Ontario on February 20, 2026, Andrew Peller Limited (TSX: ADW.A / ADW.B) stated that W. James Westlake has stepped down from the board of directors for the company, to divert attention towards other responsibilities.

data.title: AirBoss to report Q4 and FY 2025 earnings on March 4, 2026; conference call on March 5, 2026 at 9am ET. (TSX: BOS) (OTCQX: ABSSF)
data.description: On February 20, 2026, AirBoss of America Corp revealed its plan to disclose its fourth-quarter and unaudited full-year 2025 outcomes post-market closure on March 4, 2026. The company, listed as BOS on the TSX and ABSSF on the OTCQX, will hold a conference call on March 5, 2026, at 9:00 am ET to analyze the results. The audited annual consolidated financial statements and associated management’s discussion and analysis for the period concluding on December 31, 2025, will be submitted subsequent to the audit completion and as per pertinent securities regulations.

data.title: Navient (Nasdaq: NAVI) approves $0.16 dividend per share for Q1 2026, board declares.
data.description: Herndon, Virginia – On February 20, 2026, Navient (Nasdaq: NAVI) revealed that its board of directors has given the green light to a first quarter dividend for 2026. The approved dividend amounts to $0.16 per share and is to be distributed to shareholders of the company's common stock.

data.title: RCI receives Nasdaq letter about not filing 1Q26 10-Q, violates Listing Rule 5250(c)(1), remains delinquent in filing 10-K.
data.description: In Houston, on February 18, 2026, RCI Hospitality Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: RICK) received a letter from the Nasdaq Stock Market stating its noncompliance with Listing Rule 5250(c)(1) due to delayed reports filing with the SEC. The letter was sent as RCI had not submitted its Form 10-Q for the fiscal 2026 first quarter ending on December 31, 2025. Additionally, RCI had not filed its Form 10-K for the previous year. Nasdaq brought this to the company's attention as part of their monitoring process.

data.title: AES declares quarterly dividend of $0.17595 per share, payable on May 15, 2026 to shareholders of record on May 1, 2026.
data.description: In Arlington, Virginia, on February 20, 2026, it was announced that The AES Corporation (NYSE: AES) had approved a quarterly common stock dividend of $0.17595 per share. This dividend is set to be paid out on May 15, 2026, to shareholders who are recorded as such by the end of business on May 1, 2026.

data.title: Ibrahim of IICA meets USDA officials to strengthen food safety, biosecurity, and trade in the Americas. Office since Jan 15.
data.description: On February 20, 2026, Director General Muhammad Ibrahim of the Inter-American Institute for Cooperation on Agriculture (IICA) visited the United States for the first time since taking office on January 15. During his visit, he held meetings with senior officials from the U.S. Department of Agriculture.

data.title: Industry veteran Joe Bogar appointed as Head of Operator Strategy at PLACE, to aid operators in scaling. Joining on Feb 20, 2026.
data.description: Industry veteran Joe Bogar has recently been appointed as the Head of Operator Strategy at PLACE, a significant move that is set to leverage his extensive coaching and leadership expertise to aid operators in expanding their reach. The announcement came from PLACE on February 20, 2026, with this development taking place in Bellingham, Washington. This addition highlights the company's dedication to strengthening its operational strategies and signals a positive direction for its future growth.

data.title: Lake Forest Regenesis introduces Emsculpt NEO for body shaping and muscle recovery; Launch parties on Feb. 25 and April 8.
data.description: A medical clinic in Lake Forest, Illinois called Lake Forest Regenesis will be hosting launch parties on February 25 and April 8 to introduce Emsculpt Neo and Emsella to the public. These events will highlight these noninvasive treatments that target muscle building and pelvic floor strengthening. Lake Forest Regenesis, known for its holistic health care approach, is based on North Shore. The launch parties are set to take place in February and April 2026 to showcase these innovative treatments.

data.title: Fed Governor Michael Barr warns AI is displacing young US workers in entry-level jobs like software development. Labor market fragile, with near zero job creation, stalled labor force growth, and high unemployment rates. Generative AI could drive productivity growth and living standards.
data.description: Fed Governor Michael Barr recently spoke about the impact of artificial intelligence on the job market, stating that AI is starting to impact entry-level positions in fields like software development and customer service. Job creation has been minimal in the past year, while the labor force growth has slowed down and the unemployment rate remains high. Barr warned that these conditions could make the labor market vulnerable to negative shocks. He compared generative AI to past transformative technologies like the steam engine and predicted that it would drive productivity growth and higher living standards but could also displace workers. The full article can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Bel Fuse Inc. declared regular quarterly cash dividends of $0.06 per share for Class A and $0.07 per share for Class B.
data.description: In West Orange, New Jersey on February 20, 2026, BEL FUSE INC. disclosed that its Board of Directors has approved regular quarterly cash dividends for its Class A and Class B common shares. The dividends are set at $0.06 per share for Class A and $0.07 per share for Class B. The company is listed on the NASDAQ under tickers BELFA and BELFB.

data.title: Revision Skincare® DEJ Daily Boosting Serum™ wins award in advanced clinical beauty at 2025-2026 CHOICE Awards.
data.description: In Dallas on February 20, 2026, Revision Skincare®, known for its clinical research and evidence-driven results in the skincare industry, revealed that their product DEJ Daily Boosting Serum™ has won the Advanced Clinical Beauty & Performance category award with significant recognition.

data.title: Insurance expert DiCocco discusses auto insurance limits in Maryland, highlighting the difference between legal requirements and full protection.
data.description: In Rockville, Maryland on February 20, 2026, an article by HelloNation discussed the distinction between meeting the state's legal auto insurance standards and ensuring comprehensive protection while driving. The piece highlights perspectives from Insurance Expert Daniel C. DiCocco based in Rockville. It delves into the importance of understanding the disparity between mere compliance with Maryland's auto insurance regulations and having complete insurance coverage for effective road safety.

data.title: CUPE Alberta calls for election, criticizes Smith's anti-immigrant referendum as distraction from public service mismanagement.
data.description: In Edmonton, AB, CUPE Alberta President Raj Uppal criticized Premier Danielle Smith's proposal for an anti-immigrant referendum in an attempt to restrict voting access for Albertans. Uppal emphasized the importance for the government to address pressing issues such as healthcare, education, living expenses, and employment opportunities. The referendum intends to make it more challenging for residents to vote, diverting attention from critical concerns. Uppal urged Smith to prioritize essential matters affecting Albertans and focus on resolving existing crises.

data.title: Investissement Ray Junior announces commercial opportunities for future Mōrea Water Park in Mirabel, QC, led by Ray Junior Courtemanche.
data.description: In Mirabel, Quebec, on February 20, 2026, Investissement Ray Junior, headed by innovative entrepreneur Ray Junior Courtemanche, has revealed the launch of commercial prospects linked to the forthcoming Mōrea Water Park.
